caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up in a bun and wearing black headphones and a black t-shirt is seated in a studio. She is positioned behind a professional black microphone. In the background, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red text above some graphics, with a smaller label that reads "Employee Only" in the upper right corner. To her right is a yellow vertical stripe against a white wall. Across the bottom of the scene, logos for "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST" are visible, alongside text that says "By: 11 logo Guba". The woman looks slightly to her left with a neutral to pleasant expression. Between the frames, she remains largely stationary, subtly shifting her gaze and head position while maintaining her posture behind the microphone.
